editions.effect:
%The first time a Chessman ally enters the field under your control during each of your turns, that ally gets +2 [POWER] until end of turn.% Whenever one or more Chessman allies enter the field under your control for the first time during each of your turns, choose one of them and that ally gets +2[POWER] until end of turn.%

The first Chessman Command card you activate during each of your turns enters the intent with +2 [POWER].
editions.effect_raw:
Whenever one or more Chessman allies enter the field under your control for the first time during each of your turns, choose one of them and that ally gets +2POWER until end of turn.

The first Chessman Command card you activate during each of your turns enters the intent with +2 POWER.

name: Field of Ranks and Files

result_editions.effect:
%The first time a Chessman ally enters the field under your control during each of your turns, that ally gets +2 [POWER] until end of turn.% Whenever one or more Chessman allies enter the field under your control for the first time during each of your turns, choose one of them and that ally gets +2[POWER] until end of turn.%

The first Chessman Command card you activate during each of your turns enters the intent with +2 [POWER].
result_editions.effect_raw:
Whenever one or more Chessman allies enter the field under your control for the first time during each of your turns, choose one of them and that ally gets +2POWER until end of turn.

The first Chessman Command card you activate during each of your turns enters the intent with +2 POWER.
result_editions.effect_html: The first time a Chessman ally enters the field under your control during each of your turns, that ally gets +2 until end of turn. Whenever one or more Chessman allies enter the field under your control for the first time during each of your turns, choose one of them and that ally gets +2 until end of turn.The first Chessman Command card you activate during each of your turns enters the intent with +2.

rule.description: The first ability only triggers for the first instance of a Chessman entering each turn and will consider this retroactively. If a Chessmen ally already entered before Field of Rank and Files enters, it can no longer trigger in the same turn.

The second ability only triggers for the first instance of a Chessmen Command card activation and will consider this retroactively in the same manner as the first ability. It will not apply to a second Chessmen Command card if the first did not enter the intent.

rule.title: ERRATA
